testcase.name: cn (utils) > merges single class
cn (utils) > merges multiple classes
cn (utils) > handles conditional classes
cn (utils) > merges tailwind conflicting classes
cn (utils) > handles undefined and null
FontSizeControls > renders three font size buttons
FontSizeControls > decrease is disabled at level 0
FontSizeControls > increase is disabled at level 2
FontSizeControls > has group role and aria-label
GlassCard > renders children
GlassCard > applies glass-panel and rounded-3xl by default
GlassCard > applies hover classes when hover is true
GlassCard > merges custom className
GoldButton > renders children
GoldButton > applies primary variant by default
GoldButton > applies outline variant
GoldButton > applies size classes
GoldButton > calls onClick when clicked
MercotraceIcon > renders svg with default size
MercotraceIcon > renders svg with custom size and color
MercotraceLogo > renders icon and text by default
MercotraceLogo > hides text when showText is false
MercotraceLogo > applies size variant classes
MobileBackButton > renders button with aria-label
MobileBackButton > calls onClick when clicked
MobileBackButton > applies custom className
NavLink > renders link with to path
testcase.system-err: ⚠️ React Router Future Flag Warning: React Router will begin wrapping state updates in `React.startTransition` in v7. You can use the `v7_startTransition` future flag to opt-in early. For more information, see https://reactrouter.com/v6/upgrading/future#v7_starttransition. ⚠️ React Router Future Flag Warning: Relative route resolution within Splat routes is changing in v7. You can use the `v7_relativeSplatPath` future flag to opt-in early. For more information, see https://reactrouter.com/v6/upgrading/future#v7_relativesplatpath.

testcase.name: NavLink > applies activeClassName when route is active
NavLink > renders children
PortraitLock > renders nothing when not in landscape (default)
PortraitLock > shows overlay with rotate message when in landscape
ProtectedRoute > shows loading spinner when not bootstrapped
testcase.system-err: ⚠️ React Router Future Flag Warning: React Router will begin wrapping state updates in `React.startTransition` in v7. You can use the `v7_startTransition` future flag to opt-in early. For more information, see https://reactrouter.com/v6/upgrading/future#v7_starttransition. ⚠️ React Router Future Flag Warning: Relative route resolution within Splat routes is changing in v7. You can use the `v7_relativeSplatPath` future flag to opt-in early. For more information, see https://reactrouter.com/v6/upgrading/future#v7_relativesplatpath.

testcase.name: ProtectedRoute > redirects to /login when bootstrapped and not authenticated
ProtectedRoute > renders children when bootstrapped and authenticated
RootClassManager > renders nothing
testcase.system-err: ⚠️ React Router Future Flag Warning: React Router will begin wrapping state updates in `React.startTransition` in v7. You can use the `v7_startTransition` future flag to opt-in early. For more information, see https://reactrouter.com/v6/upgrading/future#v7_starttransition. ⚠️ React Router Future Flag Warning: Relative route resolution within Splat routes is changing in v7. You can use the `v7_relativeSplatPath` future flag to opt-in early. For more information, see https://reactrouter.com/v6/upgrading/future#v7_relativesplatpath.

testcase.name: RootClassManager > adds is-trader-app to #root on non-admin path
RootClassManager > removes is-trader-app from #root on admin path
ScrollToTop > renders nothing
testcase.system-err: ⚠️ React Router Future Flag Warning: React Router will begin wrapping state updates in `React.startTransition` in v7. You can use the `v7_startTransition` future flag to opt-in early. For more information, see https://reactrouter.com/v6/upgrading/future#v7_starttransition. ⚠️ React Router Future Flag Warning: Relative route resolution within Splat routes is changing in v7. You can use the `v7_relativeSplatPath` future flag to opt-in early. For more information, see https://reactrouter.com/v6/upgrading/future#v7_relativesplatpath.

testcase.name: Watermark > renders children inside wrapper
Watermark > applies animate-watermark class
RegistrationWatermark > renders LISTING ONLY and AWAITING APPROVAL text
CommodityWatermark > renders price formula and weight labels
useDesktopMode > returns boolean and subscribes to matchMedia
useIsMobile > returns boolean and subscribes to matchMedia
Index > renders welcome heading and message
NotFound > renders 404 message and link to home
testcase.system-err: ⚠️ React Router Future Flag Warning: React Router will begin wrapping state updates in `React.startTransition` in v7. You can use the `v7_startTransition` future flag to opt-in early. For more information, see https://reactrouter.com/v6/upgrading/future#v7_starttransition. ⚠️ React Router Future Flag Warning: Relative route resolution within Splat routes is changing in v7. You can use the `v7_relativeSplatPath` future flag to opt-in early. For more information, see https://reactrouter.com/v6/upgrading/future#v7_relativesplatpath.

testcase.name: AuthContext > bootstraps and sets hasBootstrapped true when getProfile returns null
AuthContext > sets authenticated state when getProfile returns profile
FontSizeContext > provides default level 0, scale 1, label Default
FontSizeContext > increase moves to level 1 then 2
FontSizeContext > increase does not go above 2
FontSizeContext > decrease moves level down and does not go below 0
FontSizeContext > reset sets level to 0
ThemeContext > provides isDark false by default
ThemeContext > toggles isDark when toggleTheme is called
ThemeContext > persists theme to localStorage
example > should pass
storage > delay > resolves after specified ms
storage > delay > returns a promise
storage > id > returns a string
storage > id > returns UUID-like format (8-4-4-4-12 hex)
storage > now > returns ISO date string
Button > renders children
Button > applies default variant classes
Button > applies destructive variant
Button > calls onClick when clicked
authApi > login > throws with custom message when response has detail containing Invalid email or password
authApi > login > throws with default message when response is not ok and not JSON
authApi > getProfile > returns null on 401
authApi > getProfile > returns profile when ok
http > API_BASE > defaults to localhost:8080/api when VITE_API_URL unset
http > API_BASE > strips trailing slashes from base
http > apiFetch > calls fetch with correct URL and credentials
http > apiFetch > sets Content-Type application/json when body is not FormData
http > apiFetch > does not override Content-Type when provided
